    O

    onElementParsed(ParsingEvent) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.api.IConfigEventListener
    Called when a configuration element has been parsed.
    onExecutionStarted() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when program execution begins.
    onExecutionStopped() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the program execution stops.
    onExitCodeChanged(byte) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the program exit code changes.
    onFlagChanged(boolean, boolean, boolean) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the machine status flags change.
    onInputRequested() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the executing program requests input.
    onMaxJumpsReached() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the maximum allowed number of jumps has been reached.
    onOutput(int) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the program produces an output value.
    onProgrammeCounterChanged(int) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the programme counter changes.
    onRegisterChanged(int, int) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the value of a register changes.
    opcode() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.compiling.ICompiledInstruction
    Returns the opcode for this instruction.
    opcode() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.internal.compiling.ConcreteCompiledInstruction
    Returns the value of the opcode record component.
    opcode() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.ConfigInstruction
    Returns the value of the opcode record component.
    OpCode - Variable in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.api.AbstractInstruction
     
    OPERAND - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.compiling.OperandConcept
     
    OperandConcept - Enum Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.compiling
    Defines the conceptual role of a compiled operand within an instruction OperandConcept.RESULT - operand where the result of the operation is going OperandConcept.OPERAND - source operand participating in computation OperandConcept.TARGET - operand used as a jump/branch target
    operands - Variable in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.internal.parsing.ConcreteInstructionNode
     
    operands() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.compiling.ICompiledInstruction
    Returns the compiled operands associated with this instruction.
    operands() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.internal.compiling.ConcreteCompiledInstruction
    Returns the value of the operands record component.
    operands() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.ConfigInstruction
    Returns the value of the operands record component.
    OperandType - Enum Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.compiling
    Defines the type of compiled operand.
    OR - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.nodes.ConditionToken.Type
     
    OrCondition - Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions
    Condition that evaluates to true if at least one contained condition evaluates to true.
    OrCondition(ICondition...) - Constructor for class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions.OrCondition
     
    OrCondition(List) - Constructor for class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions.OrCondition
     
    OrNode - Record Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.nodes

    Creates an instance of a OrNode record class.
    output() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ExecutionSnapshot
    Returns the value of the output record component.
    output(int) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Sends a value to the program output
    output(int) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Emits an output value from the program.
    OutputInstruction - Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions
    Instruction handler that outputs a value from the execution context.
    OutputInstruction(byte, int, ICondition) - Constructor for class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.OutputInstruction
     
    overflow() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ExecutionSnapshot
    Returns the value of the overflow record component.
